channel.title: AI Education on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog
channel.description: Recent content in AI Education on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog

item.title: Anthropic Gives Free Access
item.description:
Introduction to Anthropic and Claude  

Anthropic is a company that focuses on developing artificial intelligence (AI) technologies, including the Claude AI model. Claude is designed to assist and augment human capabilities in various tasks, and its premium features are now being made available to teachers for free. This move aims to enhance the educational experience and provide teachers with innovative tools to support their teaching practices.
